# AyudaVE

AyudaVE is a public emergency-aid web application for Venezuela earthquake response.

Main site: https://example.org/
Open data feed: https://example.org/api.php?action=export_public
API metadata: https://example.org/api.php?action=metadata
Sync status: https://example.org/api.php?action=sync_status
OpenAPI contract: https://example.org/openapi.json
Sources index: https://example.org/sources.json
Sitemap: https://example.org/sitemap.xml

Useful pages:
- https://example.org/ayuda-terremoto-venezuela.html
- https://example.org/como-reportar-ayuda-venezuela.html
- https://example.org/directorio-ayuda-venezuela.html
- https://example.org/datos-abiertos-ayudave.html

Data policy:
- Public export excludes private contacts and secrets.
- Source attribution is preserved when records are synchronized from external public sources.
- People-missing/person-sensitive data should not be imported into the public map without a separate authenticated privacy workflow.
